summary: Completed frontend testing of 4 new enhancements: (1) Password show/hide toggle across all auth pages, (2) Tenant business_type classification in SaaS Admin, (3) User edit/delete functionality in Settings, (4) Sidebar visibility verification for admin/super_admin roles. All features working correctly.

passed_tests.details: data-testid='toggle-password-visibility' button toggles password field type between 'password' and 'text'. Eye/EyeOff icons work correctly.
Password field has show/hide toggle button. Toggles between masked (••••) and visible text correctly.
Both password and confirm_password fields have independent show/hide toggles. Both work correctly.
New user dialog in Settings page has password field with Eye icon toggle. Works correctly.

passed_tests.feature: Password Toggle - Add Tenant Dialog (SaaS Admin)
passed_tests.details: Add Tenant dialog shows password field with EyeOff icon when visible. Toggle switches between hidden/visible.
تصنيف المشترك dropdown in Add Tenant dialog with 3 options: تاجر تجزئة (Retailer), تاجر جملة (Wholesaler), موزع (Distributor). Each has appropriate icon.
التصنيف column visible in tenants table. Shows badges with icons: Store (retailer), ShoppingBag (wholesaler), Truck (distributor).
تعديل بيانات المستخدم dialog opens when clicking Edit button. Shows name, email, role fields with save/cancel buttons.
Red trash icon button present for each user row (except current user and super_admin). Deletion requires confirmation.
Admin user (admin@test.com) sees 14 sidebar sections including: إدارة الموظفين, الإدارة, WooCommerce, التوصيل

passed_tests.feature: Sidebar - Super Admin sees NT Commerce
passed_tests.details: Super admin (super@ntcommerce.com) sees NT Commerce section in sidebar for SaaS management.
إدارة الموظفين section with items: الموظفين, تنبيهات الحدود, صلاحيات المبيعات visible for admin users.
AuthContext.js line 78 correctly defines: isAdmin = user?.role === 'admin' || user?.role === 'super_admin'

context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new enhancements fully tested: (1) Password show/hide toggle on /login, /tenant-login, /register pages and in Add User/Add Tenant dialogs - all use Eye/EyeOff lucide icons. (2) Tenant business_type in SaaS Admin - dropdown with 3 types (retailer/wholesaler/distributor) and table column with colored badges. (3) User edit/delete in Settings - Edit opens dialog with name/email/role, Delete has confirmation. (4) Sidebar visibility - isAdmin in AuthContext includes super_admin, all admin-only sections visible to both roles, NT Commerce only for super_admin.
